name: edit_file
description: Edit a file by exact string replacement. The string `old` must appear exactly once in the file (unless replace_all is set); it is replaced with `new`. To create a new file, use an empty `old` on a non-existing path.

path.description: File path relative to the workspace root.

old.description: Exact text to replace; must match exactly once unless replace_all is set. Empty to create a new file.

new.description: Replacement text (the full file content when creating).

replace_all.description: Replace every occurrence of `old` instead of requiring a unique match. Use for renaming a variable or repeated token.
